description.ko: 접힌 유리 돛이 질주하는 백색광을 받아 밝은 무지개 에너지로 굴절시킵니다.
description.en: Folded glass sails catch racing white light and refract it into bright rainbow energy.

prompt: PRISM-2 refraction sprint inside a brilliant white optical atrium: a weightless flock of ultra-clear glass origami sails, folded crescent panels, and razor-thin transparent winglets sweeps around a small white photon seed in an upward spiral. Thin bursts of white light dart through the folded glass creases and curved edges, instantly dispersing into fast zigzag ribbons of #FF0080 magenta, #00FF80 mint green, #8000FF violet, and #FFFF00 yellow. Rainbow caustics hang in the air as angular sunburst maps, sharp contour-line glows, and prismatic splash marks, while crisp chromatic aberration splits every polished fold and bevel into luminous colored fringes. Bright high-key atmosphere, low sparse particles, clean negative space, sharp internal reflections, energetic motion trails, pure rainbow energy suspended without a tabletop, dark surface, or single straight beam setup.
